mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID, USER_NM FROM ( SELECT I.USER_ID, I.USER_NM FROM mhdb.TB_USER_INFO I WHERE I.USE_YN = 'Y' AND '1' = #{userGb} UNION ALL SELECT I.USER_GRP_ID, I.USER_GRP_NM FROM mhdb.TB_USER_GROUP I WHERE I.USE_YN = 'Y' AND '2' = #{userGb} ) T1 ORDER BY 2

SELECT DISTINCT MENU_ID, MENU_CD, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, MENU_ORDER FROM ( SELECT M.MENU_ID , lpad(M.MENU_CD,5,'0') MENU_CD , M.MENU_NM , M.MENU_URL , M.MENU_ORDER FROM mhdb.TB_MENU M, mhdb.TB_USER_AUTH A, mhdb.TB_USER_INFO I WHERE A.USER_ID = I.USER_ID AND I.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID AND #{userGb} = A.USER_GB UNION ALL SELECT M.MENU_ID , lpad(M.MENU_CD,5,'0') MENU_CD , M.MENU_NM , M.MENU_URL , M.MENU_ORDER FROM mhdb.TB_MENU M, mhdb.TB_USER_AUTH A, mhdb.TB_USER_MEMBER U, mhdb.TB_USER_INFO I WHERE U.USER_ID = I.USER_ID AND U.USER_GRP_ID = #{userId} AND A.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID AND U.USER_GRP_ID = A.USER_ID AND #{userGb} = A.USER_GB ) T1 ORDER BY 5

SELECT DISTINCT MENU_ID, MENU_CD, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, MENU_ORDER FROM ( SELECT M.MENU_ID , lpad(M.MENU_CD,5,'0') MENU_CD , M.MENU_NM , M.MENU_URL , M.MENU_ORDER FROM mhdb.TB_MENU M, mhdb.TB_USER_AUTH A, mhdb.TB_USER_GROUP I WHERE A.USER_ID = I.USER_GRP_ID AND I.USER_GRP_ID = #{userId} AND A.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID AND #{userGb} = A.USER_GB UNION ALL SELECT M.MENU_ID , lpad(M.MENU_CD,5,'0') MENU_CD , M.MENU_NM , M.MENU_URL , M.MENU_ORDER FROM mhdb.TB_MENU M, mhdb.TB_USER_AUTH A, mhdb.TB_USER_MEMBER U, mhdb.TB_USER_GROUP I WHERE U.USER_ID = I.USER_GRP_ID AND U.USER_GRP_ID = #{userId} AND A.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID AND U.USER_GRP_ID = A.USER_ID AND #{userGb} = A.USER_GB ) T1 ORDER BY 5
